Upcomers 75% OFF BOGO Deal

Upcomers is offering a massive 75% discount on all challenge accounts using code BOGO75. This promotion makes it one of the most affordable entry points to a prop firm that offers a staggering $2.5 million scaling cap and an industry-record 99% profit split for funded traders. At 75% off, you get access to extreme capital potential at a price point normally associated with much smaller, less ambitious firms.

Upcomers is a rapidly growing proprietary trading firm founded in 2023 and built around a philosophy of extreme capital access and maximum profit retention. The firm has positioned itself at the top end of the prop trading market by offering a 99% profit split — the highest in the industry — combined with a scaling program that can reach $2.5 million in total capital allocation. This combination makes Upcomers uniquely attractive for highly profitable traders who want to maximize their absolute dollar returns on each trading session.

With code BOGO75, the 75% discount reduces your challenge fee dramatically across all account tiers, making the cost-to-capital ratio at Upcomers essentially unmatched. The 99% profit split means that for every $100 you earn as a funded trader, you keep $99. Combined with a $2.5M scaling ceiling, a highly profitable Upcomers funded trader is positioned to generate income at a level that no other prop firm currently enables at the same profit split percentage.

Upcomers supports MT5, cTrader, and DXTrade platforms — three of the most respected execution environments in the prop trading space. The firm allows copy trading and EA use, and their challenge structure includes a standard two-step evaluation with defined profit targets and drawdown limits. Payouts are processed through Bank Transfer and Crypto with a minimum payout of $50, and processing times range from instant to 14 days depending on the method. Forbidden strategies include arbitrage and HFT.

To claim this deal, visit Upcomers via the affiliate link above, select your preferred challenge account size, and enter BOGO75 at checkout for a 75% reduction on your order. The 99% profit split and $2.5M scaling program are standard for all Upcomers funded traders and require no additional code. Review the current Upcomers challenge terms to understand the profit targets and drawdown limits before purchasing.
